@everyone

Time Slot #2 for Surge Starts NOW!

The second and final Surge time slot has begun! 

Thanks to the overwhelming support in the first time slot, with over 1,000 players in one instance, all rewards are unlocked. All that's left is for you to play and earn your rewards.

Time slot #2 will end in
